summary: A two-story residential building with a gable roof, elevated on a white concrete foundation. The structure features brick walls on the upper level, sandstone/concrete walls on the lower level, and multiple window openings arranged symmetrically. The building sits within a dirt courtyard bordered by a brown dirt path.
rebuild_hints: Build 10×10 block footprint with 2 floors of 3 blocks height each
Construct white concrete foundation platform approximately 1 block tall
Lower floor walls: sandstone blocks with gray stonebrick corner pillars
Upper floor walls: sandstone with horizontal wood or brown trim band
Roof: gable style using red/brown brick, peaked at center
Windows: place 4-5 window openings per floor, evenly spaced, with glass panes
Add horizontal trim/slab between first and second floor
Ensure symmetry across front and back facades
Surround with dirt courtyard and brown dirt path border
uncertainties: Exact window count and precise positioning uncertain from angled views
Interior layout and room configuration not visible
Precise material transitions between sandstone and brick unclear
Roof peak height and exact slope angle estimated from perspective
Whether corner pillars are full-height or partial uncertain
Door/entrance location not visible in provided views
